description:
Implement `hx-divider` (T1-23) — 6/6 enterprise libraries ship this. Horizontal or vertical separator line with optional label.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-divider/`:
- `index.ts` — re-export
- `hx-divider.ts` — Lit component
- `hx-divider.styles.ts` — CSS with `--hx-*` tokens
- `hx-divider.stories.ts` — Storybook stories
- `hx-divider.test.ts` — Vitest tests

**Props:** `orientation` (`horizontal`|`vertical`, default `horizontal`), `spacing` (`none`|`sm`|`md`|`lg`)

**Slots:** default (optional label text — renders centered between lines when present)

**CSS Parts:** `base` (the hr/divider element), `label` (optional centered text)

**ARIA:** Host gets `role="separator"`, `aria-orientation` matching prop. When vertical, must be used as a presentational element between siblings.

**Implementation note:** Use `<hr>` semantics in the shadow root. When slotted content exists, render as flex row with two `<span>` lines flanking the slot.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests pass, axe-core zero violations, Storybook with horizontal/vertical/with-label, CEM accurate, bundle < 2KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-divider — T1-23 Visual Separator
